title: helictochloa pratensis subsp. requienii
intro: Helictochloa pratensis subsp. requienii, also known as Requien's bent or dwarf bent-grass, is a type of grass native to Europe and Western Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds that can be used to treat skin conditions and wounds. The health benefits of Helictochloa pratensis subsp. requienii include its ability to promote wound healing, reduce inflammation, and soothe skin irritations. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make infusions, decoctions, and creams, which are used to treat a variety of skin conditions, including eczema and acne.
